transcript.clean_text: beautiful weather and rising temperatures on the tour of catalonia still though the weather would have an impact on this second day 202.4 kilometers running from the spanish side of catalunya into the franco catalan city of perpignan a looping course once again first coming inland before returning to the coast and then cutting back to the famous french city this the terrain quite lumpy right from the very beginning flattening out though crucially in an open plane where crosswinds were going to be a factor well everyone knew this a breakaway did establish itself peter burke wearing the mountains classification jersey the red stripes he was out front along with boo from us cartel and burgos moreno well with such anxiety about crosswinds it meant that the bunch were very very close together and as a result that milling around on the ever changing road would lead to some bumps and bruises most of which it seemed to be carried by shelmos hitting the wall going over the top having to retrieve his own bike one of five involved in this particular crash well he was anxious to tell everyone he was okay and just get riding again give me a bike let me do my job fantastic well that was a relief shame though for richie port unwell quite clearly on the radio telling his teammates not to come back for him and to look after everybody else in fact they were all on duty rodriguez was a victim again having to be relayed back in well they all dropped back to help including kriet koski who could have had an option on the day certainly one for the quick men and as we came to that plane at the very last yet more bumps and bruises as the frantic racing went on simon yates caught out and after victory for michael matthews who would drop back well the whole team except for matthews and kaden groves who are in the front group would they be caught still more incidents along the way so compressed were they ineos trying their level best to make sure that everyone stayed safe with so many options for the overall they were driving hard 10 kilometres to go the gap was in reasonably significant over half a minute movie star were pushing it on simon yates the victim babari victorious working for phil bauhaus ultimately bauhaus would be surfing on his own after he took the final couple of curves the road opening up after quickstep had done a good job to try and get ethan vernon in the frame jumbo vismus staying safe with dennis chrisweck and omen but it was about the sprinters the call went up from groves to matthews wearing the leader's jersey to put in the pace matthews did groves decided to follow the wheel cleverly of phil bauhaus bauhaus going for the line but groves came at exactly the right moment to deny bauhaus a victory two stages two wins then for bike exchange but a bruising as well in terms of time lost by simon yates fantastic end to a great day of drama on the map it looked like it might be quite benign but the crosswinds had an impact throughout the day you had to be brave to win it have some power as well and caden groves had exactly that gross take here ahead of bauhaus offsetter vernon milano penelope matthews christ bike vanderbila and jensen shomos the man who went over the wall well a new leader at the top as well as we head into the mountains tomorrow winderberg leads matthews by one second only as we head for the high ground and la molina well with all the drama on the flatlands what on earth will we have when the road heads towards the sky tomorrow is our starting point and plenty of climbs along the way well we thought that la molina may well even get cancelled if the snows had come thankfully they're staying away and we will race three category one test as well drama guaranteed you
